text: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
Allah is with those who are patient.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor].
Establish prayer for My remembrance.
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.
We send down in the Quran that which is a healing and a mercy for believers.
Actions are judged by intentions.
My mercy encompasses all things.
Be in this world as though you were a stranger or a traveler.
Allah loves those who are constantly repentant.
Seek help through patience and prayer.
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him.
Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him speak good or remain silent.
Your Lord has not forsaken you, nor is He displeased.
If you tried to count Allah's favors, you could never enumerate them.
Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing.
Allah is gentle and loves gentleness in all matters.
The best among you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
